chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1121 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-14950/2016 2. For orders on office objection 3. For katcha peshi. 28.10.2016. Mr. Ayaz Ali Ghuryani, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = After filing of the statement on behalf of the official respondents, the present petition can be disposed of with the following directions:- The private respondent No.6-Akhtiar, who was a husband of the petitioner, shall not cause any harassment to her (petitioner) and even if he has some grievance, the same shall be redressed before the competent Court of law. Similarly, the official respondents shall ensure that petitioner lady is not harassed in any manner and whenever they are approached by petitioner for providing protection, the same will be provided to her in accordance with law. With these observations, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of. Copy of this order be provided to the learned Additional A.G Sindh, for compliance and issuing necessary directions. JUDGE Shahid
